name: clue rejects pressure thread evidence question

source.purpose: A pressure-thread fact should not become a clue merely because the Archivist invented an evidence_question.

input.playerInput: Ask why the lien was filed before we docked.

narrator.prose: Voss says the lien was filed six months before the ship docked, then uses the timing to press the crew toward the cargo job.

payload.content: The lien was filed six months before the ship docked, giving Voss leverage to push the crew toward the cargo job.
payload.evidence_question: Was the lien timed to force the Voss job offer?
payload.retrieval_cue: Lien timing used as cargo-job leverage.
